parsed.production_notes: The video uses human-recorded footage for both panels, but the audio for the male character is a clear voiceover that does not sync with his lip movements, suggesting it was either dubbed by a different actor or AI-generated.

characters.appearance: A middle-aged South Asian man, likely in his 40s or 50s, with a heavy build. He has a dark complexion, short, dark, slightly curly hair, and a prominent, thick black mustache. His facial expression is serious and focused.
characters.wardrobe: A light brown or tan short-sleeved polo shirt.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman, likely in her early 20s, with a slender build. She has a fair complexion, long, straight, center-parted black hair, and dark eyes. Her features are soft and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A black top with white floral or leaf-patterned embroidery around the V-neckline.
characters.demeanor: Initially pained and confused, she becomes curious, thoughtful, and finally optimistic and happy.

scenes.setting: A split-screen setup. The top panel is an outdoor street food stall on a busy Indian street during the day. The bottom panel is a residential rooftop or balcony, also during the day.
scenes.camera: split-screen, with both panels framed as medium close-ups

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium shot of a middle-aged Indian man, Character A, standing inside a blue-framed street food stall on a city street. He has a heavy build, dark skin, dark curly hair, and a thick mustache. He wears a tan polo shirt and looks down with a focused expression, using a metal ladle to stir something in a pot just out of frame. In front of him is a tray of bright orange fried food. The background is a blurred street scene with parked motorcycles and buildings. The lighting is natural daylight.

A medium close-up shot of a young Indian woman, Character B, outdoors on what appears to be a balcony or rooftop. She has long, straight black hair and is wearing a black top with white embroidery. The background consists of a plain, light-colored wall, a glimpse of another building, and a bright, slightly overcast sky. Her expression shifts throughout the scene from pained, to confused, to thoughtful, and finally to a pleasant smile. The lighting is bright, natural daylight.

scenes.visual_description: The video is presented in a vertical, split-screen format for its entire duration. The top panel features Character A, a male street food vendor, and the bottom panel features Character B, a young woman on a rooftop. They engage in a conversation where Character A corrects Character B's English and introduces an app. Throughout the dialogue, colorful text overlays, animated emojis (like fire and falling money), and app icons appear on screen to emphasize key points and provide a call to action. The 'MySivi' brand logo is consistently visible in the top right corner.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: [Sipping sound]

Character A says: क्या हुआ? [What happened?]

Character B says: I got a burning tongue.

Character A says: ये burnt tongue है, burning tongue नहीं। [This is burnt tongue, not burning tongue.]

Character B says: क्या? [What?]

Character A says: अरे burning tongue एक बीमारी होती है। Burnt tongue होता है जब तुमने गरम चाय पी के जीभ जला ली हो। [Hey, burning tongue is a disease. Burnt tongue is when you've burnt your tongue by drinking hot tea.]

Character B says: ठीक है ठीक है, मुझे English अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Okay okay, I don't know English well.]

Character A says: अरे AI teachers try किये? [Hey, have you tried AI teachers?]

Character B says: वो तो महंगे होते होंगे ना? [Those must be expensive, right?]

Character A says: बिलकुल नहीं। Normal English classes से 100 गुना सस्ता है। इसपे 40 लाख लोग MySivi पे English practice कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It's 100 times cheaper than normal English classes. 4 million people are practicing English on MySivi.]

Character B says: पर time ही नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get the time.]

Character A says: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15-20 minute की practice काफी है। बिलकुल confident हो जाओगी। [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will become completely confident.]

Character B says: Wow! कैसे join करूं? [Wow! How do I join?]

Character A says: ये Install का button दबाओ और MySivi app install करो। Sign up करो और practice start करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में तुम्हे improvement दिखने लगेगा। चलो, शुरू हो जाओ। [Press this Install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will see improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
